## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` and `pnpm test` pass locally
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:` / `fix:` / ...)
- [ ] New UI text uses vue-i18n (keys added to both `zh-CN.json` and `en-US.json`)
- [ ] No writes to Claude Code's JSONL files (`~/.claude/projects/` stays read-only)
- [ ] Version fields not edited by hand
